overall.description: Gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a hunter character walking through a gothic cathedral interior and then exploring the exterior grounds under a surreal purple night sky. The character navigates through stone corridors, courtyards, and staircases surrounded by elaborate gothic architecture and statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral nave with stone statues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central aisle of the cathedral toward the bright stained glass window

entered.detail: tall stone statues of robed figures lining both sides of the nave
ornate red carpet with gold patterns running down the center aisle
lit candles in holders placed along the sides of the aisle
large illuminated window at the far end of the cathedral emitting bright white light
elaborate altar with candelabras at the end of the nave

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the interior of a grand gothic cathedral, passing rows of stone statues and lit candles on either side of a red carpeted aisle. The space is dimly lit with artificial candlelight, leading toward a bright stained glass window at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral exterior courtyard under cosmic sky

events.description: exits the cathedral interior into the open exterior courtyard
begins descending stone stairs into a lower courtyard area

agents.ego_description: exploring the cathedral grounds, walking past stone pillars and iron fences under the purple sky

entered.detail: massive gothic cathedral facade with flying buttresses and spires
surreal purple and pink cosmic sky with swirling clouds
tall stone pillars marking the entrance to the courtyard
ornate black iron fences with pointed tips lining the pathways
open cobblestone courtyard with scattered vegetation
gnarled dead trees with twisted branches silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cathedral into a vast open courtyard under an otherworldly purple sky. They navigate around stone pillars and iron fences, descending stairs into lower areas of the gothic complex while the massive cathedral facade looms in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower cathedral walkways with stone archways

events.description: enters a narrow passage with stone archways and covered walkways
ascends stone stairs toward an arched doorway entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow exterior walkways, descending and ascending stone staircases between gothic structures

entered.detail: large stone archway forming a tunnel-like passage
confined walkway between high stone walls with overgrown vegetation
tall weathered stone walls with intricate carvings
gothic arched entrance at the top of a staircase

segments.scene_description: The character moves through narrower exterior passages with stone archways and walls, transitioning from the open courtyard to more confined walkways. They navigate down and then back up weathered stone stairs, passing under archways and approaching a gothic doorway entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the dim interior of a grand gothic cathedral toward a source of brilliant light. It begins by tracking a character walking down a red carpeted aisle, flanked by rows of stone statues and flickering candles. As the character advances, the artificial candlelight casts deep shadows across the ornate architecture, creating a mood of solemnity. The scene then opens up as the camera moves closer to the far end of the hall, where the dimness gives way to the vivid glow of a large stained glass window.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from the enclosed interior of a cathedral into a vast, open-air gothic courtyard under a surreal purple sky. It begins with the character emerging from the building's threshold, immediately revealing the otherworldly hue of the night sky above. As the camera moves forward, the perspective navigates around weathered stone pillars and iron fences, keeping the massive, looming facade of the cathedral in view. The scene then shifts downward as the character descends a series of stone stairs, moving deeper into the lower reaches of the sprawling gothic complex.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic exterior that shifts from an open courtyard into a series of increasingly confined stone passages. It begins by leaving the open space, moving through narrow walkways framed by weathered stone archways and high walls. As the character progresses, the path descends down a set of worn stone stairs before climbing back up, weaving through the oppressive architecture. The scene then tightens further as the camera passes under a final archway, finally approaching a heavy gothic doorway entrance.
